topic: Real-time pose estimation + cable-driven impedance control for H-Walker

hardware.sbc: Jetson Orin NX 16GB (JetPack 6.x, MAXN + jetson_clocks, GPU 918MHz locked)
hardware.camera: ZED X Mini (GMSL2, SVGA 960x600 @ 120fps, Global Shutter, PERFORMANCE depth)

2026-03-24_model_comparison.purpose: 6 pose model baseline comparison on Jetson Orin NX
2026-03-24_model_comparison.metric_definition: E2E = capture + preprocess + inference + postprocess, measured as wall-clock per frame

results.note: CPU fallback (CUDA EP not enabled on Jetson build)

2026-03-24_model_comparison.key_takeaway: Only YOLO family (n/s/11/26) meets 50ms target. YOLO26s chosen as base for fine-tuning — highest confidence while still in budget.

2026-03-27_fine_tuned_lower6.purpose: Fine-tune YOLO26s 17kpt → lower body 6kpt only (L/R hip, knee, ankle)
caveats: p95 for 6kpt row was not recorded; paper-quality comparison needs re-measurement under identical 15s protocol
44ms baseline is consistent with 3/24 YOLO26s E2E (44.4ms) within measurement noise
attributed_gains: Head size reduction (17kpt → 6kpt) → lower postprocess cost
Smaller output tensor → fewer argmax/scatter ops on GPU → predict time drop

2026-04-15_pipeline_integration.purpose: Full pipeline with PipelinedCamera + DirectTRT + C++ postprocess pybind11
key_optimizations: PipelinedCamera Double Buffer + Event (grab hidden behind predict)
GPU output parsing: top-1 conf only (18 floats copied instead of 7200)
BGRA pass-through (1 color conversion instead of 2)

2026-04-17_python_only_peak.purpose: PipelinedCamera redesign: ready_rgb / ready_depth split → fetch 0ms full time
2026-04-17_python_only_peak.world_frame_method: B (IMU quaternion N=20 average → static R, skip_imu=True)

python_plus_cpp_control.note: Slight CPU contention — mitigated via isolation: Python cores 2-5, C++ 6-7, system 0-1

2026-04-18_cuda_stream_hard_limit.purpose: CUDA_Stream 3-stage pipeline + 20ms HARD LIMIT to engineer-out stale-keypoint risk to the motor

conditions.launcher: launch_clean.sh — sudo wrapper: pkill + rm /dev/shm/sem.ipc_test_* + systemctl restart nvargus-daemon + jetson_clocks + exec chrt -r 90 sudo -u user

safety_architecture.frame_skip_pattern: if e2e > 20ms → publish_valid=False → C++ control loop sees invalid, skips that frame
safety_architecture.five_layer_force_clamp: C++ side final clamp to 70N even if upstream wrong

failure_modes_observed_and_solved: Argus IPC file accumulation (/dev/shm/sem.ipc_test_*) across restarts → 60%+ violation rate in re-runs. Solved by launch_clean.sh sudo wrapper
sudo chrt directly → torch ModuleNotFoundError (root env). Solved by exec chrt -r 90 sudo -u user -H env PYTHONPATH=... (RT priority inherited across uid switch)
Manual --camera-pitch-deg override had wrong sign → replaced with IMU quaternion fusion from get_pose().get_orientation()

evolution_summary.note: ready_rgb/depth split, fetch 0ms, Method B static R
With C++ control loop, CPU isolation

pipeline_contribution.attributed_to: PipelinedCamera, DirectTRT, C++ postprocess, CPU isolation

safety_guarantees.method: frame-skip via valid=False flag in SHM
defense_in_depth: System: launch_clean.sh restores clean Argus state on each run

paper1.title: Vision-Based Impedance Control for Cable-Driven Gait Rehabilitation
contributions_draft: 14ms/73Hz real-time pose estimation on Jetson Orin NX via pipelined camera + DirectTRT
Method B IMU world frame with static R — camera placement-free gait coordinates
20ms HARD LIMIT frame-skip pattern for stale-keypoint safety (0.031% violation over 300s, zero reach motor)
POSIX SHM seqlock + C++ watchdog 0.2s safe fallback

paper2.title: RL Sim-to-Real Policy for Gait Assistance

open_questions_for_next_meeting: 3/27 18ms 수치의 p95/std 재측정 (15s, identical protocol, FP16, imgsz 640)
Method B knee_err 좌우 비대칭 원인 규명 (C++ [-175, -152] vs Python [sym] thigh |L-R|=1cm)
Teensy 실제 모터 구동 테스트 (pretension 5N까지만 완료)
MediaPipe / OpenPose 재측정 여부 (논문 related work baseline)
Method B neutral 자동 설정 or hybrid Method A+B 전환
Clinical population IRB 및 protocol 착수 시점

intended_use: Source of truth for Paper 1 Results section
meta.maintenance: Update this JSON whenever a new benchmark row is added. Keep evolution_summary monotonically ordered.
